channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Advances in Nanoscale Imaging Reveal New Insights into the Human Immune System
item.description: At WIRED Health, immunologist Daniel Davis of Imperial College London highlighted how cutting-edge microscopy is revealing previously invisible nanoscale processes within the human immune system. Thes...

item.title: Adelabu Clarifies Tinubu Has Not Endorsed Any Oyo Governorship Candidate for 2027
item.description: For the 2027 Oyo governorship race, former Minister of Power, Adebayo Adelabu, don clarify say President Bola Ahmed Tinubu never endorse any candidate. During one stakeholders’ meeting for APC in Ibad...

item.title: Israel prolongs detention of two Gaza flotilla activists amid diplomatic criticism from Spain and Brazil
item.description: An Israeli court has extended the detention of two activists who were arrested after Israeli forces intercepted a Gaza-bound aid flotilla in international waters near Greece. The individuals, Spanish ...

item.title: Government launches full response to Mayon Volcano ashfall in Albay
item.description: President Ferdinand 'Bongbong' Marcos Jr. has directed all relevant government agencies to rapidly respond to communities affected by the ashfall from Mayon Volcano, particularly in Guinobatan and Cam...

item.title: Dana White Announces 85,000 Free Tickets for UFC Event Near the White House
item.description: UFC President and CEO Dana White revealed plans for a historic UFC event at the White House, coinciding with President Donald Trump's birthday and the country's 250th anniversary. Dubbed 'UFC Freedom ...

item.title: Indian Navy Chief’s Myanmar visit strengthens bilateral maritime cooperation and security ties
item.description: Indian Navy Chief Admiral Dinesh K Tripathi is currently on a four-day official visit to Myanmar aimed at strengthening maritime cooperation and defence ties between the two countries. During the visi...

item.title: Governor Irungu Kang'ata Confirms He Will Not Defend UDA Ticket in 2027 Elections
item.description: Murang'a County Governor Irungu Kang'ata has announced that he will not defend his seat under the United Democratic Alliance (UDA) party in the 2027 General Election. Speaking to journalists on May 3,...

item.title: Man jailed for life after fatally stabbing father outside Newark pub
item.description: Brandon Byrne, 23, was sentenced to life imprisonment with a minimum of 23 years after being found guilty of murdering 40-year-old James Cook in Newark, Nottinghamshire. The fatal incident followed an...

item.title: High Court dismisses DPP request to extend time for appeal
item.description: Dar es Salaam, Tanzania – The High Court, Dar es Salaam Sub-Registry, has dismissed an application from the Director of Public Prosecutions (DPP) which sought extra time to appeal a Temeke District Co...

item.title: Banksy unveils new statue in London highlighting social divisions
item.description: Street artist Banksy has surprised Londoners with a new statue installed in Waterloo Place, just a short distance from Trafalgar Square. The work, placed under cover of darkness last week, has drawn l...

item.title: KZN Health Responds to Concerns About Child Discharged with Minimal Pain Relief
item.description: A mother in KwaZulu-Natal expressed distress after her young daughter was reportedly discharged from Wentworth Hospital's emergency unit while in severe pain, having only been given paracetamol. Socia...

item.title: Bukoba Court Dismisses Sh525 Million Cattle Compensation Case Over Time Limit
item.description: Bukoba High Court, through its Sub-Registry, has officially dismissed a civil suit where two citizens were claiming Sh525 million as compensation for cattle. The applicants, Ruhumuja Mkama and Mapamba...

item.title: Nigerian Army Yet to Transfer Blogger Justice Crack to DSS Due to His Poor Condition
item.description: The Nigerian Army never don transfer popular blogger and social media influencer Justice Mark Chidiebere, known as Justice Crack, to the Department of State Services (DSS) despite earlier claims. Him ...

item.title: Indonesian activist Andrie Yunus survives acid attack amid military influence concerns
item.description: In Indonesia, human rights activist Andrie Yunus, aged 27, survived a brutal acid attack after recording a podcast discussing the growing influence of the military under President Prabowo Subianto. On...

item.title: Tanzania signs deal to start helium production from 2027
item.description: Tanzania has taken a big step in tapping into its helium resources after signing a strategic agreement with Helium One Global Limited. The deal, done through Songwe Helium Limited, a joint venture, ai...

item.title: Two Kenyan Sisters in UK Build Spacious Home for Their Parents
item.description: Two sisters from Eldoret, Uasin Gishu, now living in the UK, made headlines after building a KSh 8.5 million bungalow for their parents. Lucy Wilbers shared in a YouTube interview that the house, orig...

item.title: Iran puts pressure on US as Trump reviews Tehran’s peace proposal
item.description: Iran’s Revolutionary Guards have stated that the United States must choose between attempting an 'impossible' military operation or agreeing to a 'bad deal' with Tehran. This statement follows Preside...

item.title: Community crime fighter Zola Titi killed in daylight shooting in Duncan Village
item.description: A well-known community crime fighter, Zola “Ta Zet” Titi (59), was shot and killed on Saturday afternoon in Duncan Village, Eastern Cape, in a brazen daylight attack. Titi was inside his tuck shop wit...

item.title: US Attorney Pirro Provides Update on WHCD Shooting Suspect and Investigation
item.description: US Attorney for the District of Columbia, Jeanine Pirro, spoke with CNN’s Jake Tapper regarding the ongoing investigation into the White House Correspondents' Dinner (WHCD) shooting. Pirro described t...

item.title: CBSE Class 12 Result 2026 Guidelines for Passing, Re-Evaluation, and Compartment Exams
item.description: The Central Board of Secondary Education (CBSE) has released guidelines concerning the Class 12 results for the academic year 2026. Students and parents are advised to carefully note the rules regardi...
